name: Chickpea, Sweet Pepper, and Roasted Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds unpeeled boiling potatoes, cut into 1-inch cubes
1 1/2 cups cooked chickpeas or 1 14 oz. can, drained
1 large red pepper, cored, seeded, and cut into strips
2 tablespoons to 4 tbsp. Tamari Dressing (recipe follows)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a large skillet, heat oil until sizzling.
3. Add curry powder and salt; stir until thoroughly mixed.
4. Add potatoes. Cook, stirring, 3-5 minutes.
5. Transfer potatoes to a baking sheet. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until a fork inserted in the center of a potato cube goes through.
6. Remove potatoes from oven; arrange on the center of a large platter.
7. Meanwhile, toss chickpeas and bell pepper with dressing (reserve a few bell pepper strips for garnish). Adjust seasonings to taste.
8. Arrange chickpea-pepper mixture around potatoes.
9. Sprinkle with scallions and reserved bell pepper strips.
10. Garnish with corn chips.
